nodes.name: file:ml/features.py
observations: Normalization contracts: translate wrist to origin, scale by wrist-to-middle-finger-MCP distance, flatten to 63 floats
Shared contract between Python training and JS browser serving

nodes.name: function:ml/features.py:normalize
observations: Returns: (..., 63) normalized feature vector as float32
Scale step: divide by wrist-to-middle-MCP (landmark 9) xy distance
Falls back to scale=1.0 if reference distance < 1e-6
Scales xy and z by same factor

nodes.name: file:ml/synth_landmarks.py
observations: Covers 24 of 26 ASL letters (excludes J and Z: require motion)
Defines SYNTH_COLLISIONS: groups of letters with identical finger patterns that the synth cannot distinguish
Uses MediaPipe Hands index map (21 landmarks per hand)

nodes.name: function:ml/synth_landmarks.py:_polar
observations: Converts polar coordinates to Cartesian [x, y]

nodes.name: function:ml/synth_landmarks.py:_synthesize_one
observations: Generates one synthetic (21, 3) landmark frame for a given letter
Adds noise to wrist position, palm rotation, segment lengths, and joint positions
Models extended vs curled finger states per pattern

nodes.name: function:ml/synth_landmarks.py:make_dataset
observations: y shape: (N*letters,) as int64 class indices
Has __main__ entry point for quick validation

nodes.name: file:ml/train_export.py
observations: MLP training and ONNX export pipeline (baseline v1)
Imports: json, os, numpy, sklearn (MLPClassifier, train_test_split, metrics), skl2onnx
Local imports: from synth_landmarks, from features
Collision-aware accuracy reporting for synthetic data eval

nodes.name: function:ml/train_export.py:collision_aware_correct
observations: Checks if prediction is in the synth-collision equivalence class of the true label
Inner function in module scope, also used by train_export_v2.py logic

nodes.name: file:ml/train_export_v2.py
observations: Enhanced MLP training pipeline (v2) with geometry features, augmentation, and sample weighting
Imports: json, os, numpy, sklearn (MLPClassifier, train_test_split, metrics, StandardScaler), argparse
Local imports: from synth_landmarks (make_dataset, LETTERS, SYNTH_COLLISIONS)
Local imports inside functions: from features (normalize), from skl2onnx
Mirror augmentation (2x) + jitter augmentation (6x for hard classes)
Sample weighting (2.25x for hard classes: R, U, V, M, N, O)
Architecture: 256 -> 128 -> 64 with early stopping and adaptive learning rate

nodes.name: function:ml/train_export_v2.py:compute_geometry_features
observations: Computes 5 geometry features for R/U/V distinction
Features: index-middle tip distance, MCP distance, cosine angle, cross product sign, tip/MCP ratio

nodes.name: function:ml/train_export_v2.py:expand_features_with_geometry
observations: Calls normalize() from features.py and compute_geometry_features()

nodes.name: function:ml/train_export_v2.py:mirror_augment
observations: Doubles dataset for left/right hand invariance

nodes.name: function:ml/train_export_v2.py:jitter_augment
observations: Parameters: X_raw, y, labels, hard_classes, n_jitters=6, rotation_max=0.42, noise_std=0.018
Applies random rotation and Gaussian noise to hard class samples
Rotates around wrist landmark in image plane
Defaults: R, U, V, M, N, O as hard classes
Returns augmented dataset with n_jitters additional copies per hard sample

nodes.name: function:ml/train_export_v2.py:main
observations: Full pipeline: generate data, mirror augment, jitter augment, expand features, train/test split, sample weight, MLP train
Evaluates with strict accuracy, collision-aware accuracy, macro-F1, per-class accuracy with collision group info
Exports to ONNX (68-dim input), saves labels_v2.json with geometry feature descriptions
